panels.description: In/Out network traffic rate on the app container measured at the container network interface.
panels.title: Network Traffic (app container)

panels.description: RAM Usage in MB (of Puma Processes)
panels.title: RAM Usage in MB

panels.description: Total HTTP request throughput across all controllers and actions, measured in requests per second over a 30-second window.
panels.title: Requests per Second

panels.description: Total error requests (4xx/5xx) per controller action over a 24-hour window. Shows 0 for actions with no recent errors. Adjust the window size for production use.
panels.title: Requests that returned an error in the past 24 hours

panels.description: Average SQL query duration per controller action, aggregated over a 5-minute window. Shows 0 for actions with no recent requests. Adjust the window size for production use.

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_sql_duration_seconds_sum[5m]))
  /
  (sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])) > 0)
) * 1000
OR on(action, controller)
(
  sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])) * 0
)

panels.title: Average SQL latency

panels.description: Average latency per controller action, aggregated over a 5-minute window. Shows 0 for actions with no recent requests. Adjust the window size for production use.

targets.expr:
(
  sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_duration_seconds_sum[5m]))
  /
  sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_duration_seconds_count[5m]) > 0)
) * 1000
OR on(action, controller)
(
  sum by (action, controller) (rate(ruby_http_request_duration_seconds_count[5m])) * 0
)

panels.title: Average Latency

panels.description: Calculates the number of Logins in the past 24 hours with number of new sessions controller
panels.title: Number of Logins in the past 24 hours

panels.description: Total Requests per Controller with status code over the last 24 hours

targets.expr:
sum by (controller, action, status) (
  ruby_http_requests_total
  -
  (
    ruby_http_requests_total offset 24h
    OR
    ruby_http_requests_total * 0
  )
)

panels.title: Total Requests per Controller over the last 24 hours
